---
title: "daunpapua"
date: "2026-04-09"
author: "Pante E"
categories: [biodiversity,deep-sea,corals]
image: daunpapua_logo.png
description: oceanographic cruise aimed at exploring the deep-sea benthic biodiversity of Papua New Guinea
---

SCG link: <http://dx.doi.org/10.17600/18002418>

SEANOE ?

SISMER?

blog

press
